instruction: Explain why leaves often appear green.
chosen: Leaves appear green because chlorophyll reflects green wavelengths of light.
rejected: Leaves are green because they absorb green light.

instruction: Rewrite the note as a complete formal sentence.
chosen: The delivery was delayed because of the rain.
rejected: The delivery is probably arriving sometime later.

instruction: Give one benefit of public transit.
chosen: Public transit can reduce traffic congestion in cities.
rejected: Public transit always makes every trip much faster.

instruction: Give one benefit of reusable bottles.
chosen: Reusable bottles reduce single-use plastic waste over time.
rejected: Reusable bottles have no meaningful environmental effect.
